title: hbsaems 1.0.0
text: First stable release. hbsaems fits area-level Hierarchical Bayesian Small Area Estimation models following methodological tradition Rao Molina (2015) doi:10.1002/9781118735855, computational implementation adapted parameterisation prior-specification conventions ‘brms’ package (Buerkner 2017 doi:10.18637/jss.v080.i01) Stan back-end. package designed support principled Bayesian workflow advocated Gelman et al. (2020) doi:10.48550/arXiv.2011.01808 – prior predictive checks, MCMC convergence diagnostics, posterior predictive checks, leave-one-cross-validation, Bayesian model comparison averaging, prior sensitivity analysis, design-consistent benchmarking part standard pipeline. entry consolidates changelog every development cycle since 0.1.2 maintenance release; package now follows semantic versioning 1.0.0 line constitutes frozen public API.

title: hbsaems 1.0.0
text: Generic fixed_params mechanism hbm() hbm_flex(). Lets user pin distributional parameter value derived column, scalar, vector, formula evaluated data. Centralises pattern previously coded per-wrapper. hbm_betalogitnorm() refactor. Four operational modes: random ϕ\phi hyperprior; fixed ϕ\phi survey nn deff\mathrm{deff}; user-overridable hyperprior α,β\alpha,\beta via stanvars; generic fixed_params power users. Default priors filled automatically follow Liu (2009). hbm_lnln(sampling_var = ...) Fay–Herriot lognormal model. Pins σi=ψi\sigma_i = \sqrt{\psi_i} known per-area sampling variance. Custom brms response distributions. Built-support Loglogistic Shifted Loglogistic, plus public extension framework (register_hbsae_brms_custom(), read_stan_function(), build_brms_custom_family()). Stan code lives inst/stan/ plain .stan files. registered family ships log-likelihood, posterior-predict posterior-epred hooks loo(), posterior_predict(), posterior_epred() work box. Spatial random effects. CAR (ICAR / proper / BYM2) SAR (lag / error) via sre, sre_type, car_type, sar_type, M. Weight matrices can constructed bundled build_spatial_weight() shapefile coordinates. Missing-data handling. Three strategies (deleted, multiple via mice, model via brms::mi()) auto-selection handle_missing = NULL. R2D2 (Zhang et al. 2022) selectable via prior_type. Nonlinear smooth terms. Thin-plate splines Gaussian processes via nonlinear/nonlinear_type arguments. Bilingual Shiny dashboard (run_sae_app()). English / Indonesian, dedicated spatial setup tab, -app code preview, CSV / RDS data upload. Source inst/shiny/sae_app/. Benchmarking helpers (sae_benchmark(), sae_predict()). Pfeffermann-style design-consistent benchmarking --sample prediction unsampled areas.

title: hbsaems 1.0.0
text: Argument rename: predictors -> auxiliary. new name aligns Small Area Estimation literature (Rao & Molina 2015, Pfeffermann 2013). Old usage continues work one-time soft-deprecation warning scheduled removal v2.0.0. Argument rename: hbm_generic() -> hbm_flex(). Old name removed. Deprecated wrappers (legacy v0.1.x): hbcc(), hbmc(), hbpc(), hbsae(). four emit soft-deprecation warning pointing hbm(), convergence_check(), prior_check(), sae_aggregate(), sae_predict() respectively. Scheduled removal v2.0.0.

title: hbsaems 1.0.0
text: Seven new vignettes covering full workflow: hbsaems-modelling (overview), hbsaems-lnln-model, hbsaems-betalogitnorm-model, hbsaems-binlogitnorm-model, hbsaems-spatial, hbsaems-handle-missing, hbsaems-run_sae_app. follow CRAN-safe pattern: heavy Stan fits evaluated build time; representative outputs printed illustrations explicit disclaimer. Three retained vignettes: complete-workflow, advanced-features, migration-guide.

title: hbsaems 1.0.0
text: exported functions documented full roxygen2 blocks including @param, @return, @examples, references appropriate. Custom-distribution Stan code stored separate .stan files inst/stan/ (one source truth, syntax highlighting, string-escaping noise). Test suite reorganised CRAN-safe unit tests (tests/testthat/) heavy integration tests (tests/testthat/dev-tests/, gated skip_on_cran() excluded via .Rbuildignore).

title: hbsaems 0.1.0
text: Initial public release CRAN. Provided hbm(), hbcc(), hbmc(), hbpc(), hbsae(), three example datasets (data_fhnorm, data_lnln, data_betalogitnorm, data_binlogitnorm).
